arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal face new rival for Wolverhampton Wanderers’ star Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers’ Matheus Cunha is set to become one of the most talked-about names in the upcoming summer transfer window. The 24-year-old has impressed in the Premier League, attracting the attention of several top clubs eager to secure his services. Arsenal’s sporting director, Andrea Berta, is particularly keen on bringing Cunha to the Emirates, CaughtOffside […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal face new rival for Wolverhampton Wanderers’ star Matheus Cunha appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest leading PL interest in €35m deal, Manchester United and West Ham move into picture
arts.sum: The past couple of weeks or so has seen Nottingham Forest emerge as a potential suitor for Udinese’s Lorenzo Lucca. It’s now claimed there’s also interest from Manchester United and West Ham in the striker. arts.ttl: Potter on Wolves, Kudus, Ferguson and Potts
arts.sum: In the meantime, seven senior players have been away with their respective national teams, with captain Jarrod Bowen appearing twice in FIFA World Cup qualifiers for England, and Evan Ferguson scoring a vital UEFA Nations League play-off goal for Republic of Ireland.
